title: Find My Device - Warning dialog for Play button
scenario: Find My Device warning dialog does not match Figma design when Play button is clicked to locate connected headset
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
Locate and tap the 'Find My Device' feature.
Tap the Play button to start locating the connected headset.
Observe the warning dialog that appears.
expected: The warning dialog matches the Figma design specifications (correct layout, text, colors, button styles, and spacing).
